summary: Fair audience tape that captures Alpine Valley’s heavy energy, highlighted by a memorable One More Saturday Night finale.
review: The show is remembered fondly for its raw power and the closing burst of One More Saturday Night, but the recording itself suffers from limited instrument separation and a generally muddy mix. Listeners who crank the volume report an immersive experience that feels close to being there, though audiophiles may prefer a cleaner source.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is decent but not exceptional (average‑to‑good), while recording quality is only fair; combined they yield an overall mid‑range rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Instrument separation is weak and the mix can be muddy, but the tape captures the concert’s energy and heaviness; works well at high volume.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on pacing, but reviewers note a strong ending with One More Saturday Night and an overall heavy, energetic vibe.
